title: Client onboarding handoff flow simplified
description: We reduced onboarding handoff steps so project owners and clients can move from kickoff to first delivery with less back-and-forth and clearer next actions.

title: Agency market watch: local-service demand remains conversion-focused
description: Agency market tracking this week shows strongest demand around lead quality, appointment rates, and conversion reliability over broad traffic growth claims.

title: Client communication rhythm standardized for active builds
description: Project teams now follow a simpler update rhythm with plain-language summaries and clear owner responsibilities to keep delivery communication consistent.

title: Agency market watch: decision cycles favor shorter proof windows
description: Inside-agency market data indicates buyers are preferring shorter proof windows with measurable checkpoints before expanding scope.
